title: Problem Spotter
description: Observe your surroundings for 24 hours and document 3 problems you notice. Describe who is affected and why it matters.

title: Reverse Engineer a Startup
description: Pick any successful startup and write down: What problem did they solve? Who were their first users? What was their simplest version?

title: 5 Whys Challenge
description: Take any problem and ask "Why?" five times to get to the root cause. Document your chain of reasoning.

title: Customer Interview Simulation
description: Imagine you're building a product. Write 5 questions you would ask potential users to validate your idea.

title: One-Page Business Canvas
description: Pick an idea from your Startup Sparks and fill out a simplified business model canvas: Problem, Solution, Customer, Revenue.

title: Competitor Landscape Map
description: Choose a sector you're interested in and identify 5 existing solutions. What gaps do you see? Where could you differentiate?

title: Social Impact Brainstorm
description: Identify 3 social problems in your community. For each, brainstorm one technology-based and one community-based solution.

title: Pitch in 60 Seconds
description: Write a 60-second elevator pitch for your favorite idea. Include: problem, solution, target user, and why you care.

title: Build a Landing Page Mockup
description: Sketch or wireframe a landing page for a startup idea. Include headline, value proposition, CTA, and key features.

title: Revenue Model Explorer
description: For your startup idea, brainstorm 3 different ways to make money. Evaluate which is most sustainable for your target market.
